flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Sterling College are 12% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($45.8k vs $52.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sterling College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.5k → $33.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sterling College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.5k → $33.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 17 pp at Sterling College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (29.0% vs 46.5%).
